issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has {Foxy Pirates} type, not if a card is on board.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing 'amount' parameter (look at 5 cards, reveal up to 1). The current DSL does not capture the 'look at 5' mechanic or the 'place rest at bottom in any order' instruction.
